_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of ML platform components including feature stores, model registries, experiment tracking systems, model serving infrastructure, and pipeline orchestration frameworks.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.581), DG-A-001 (DG, cosine: 0.558).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.644). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [operational, platforms] vs WIDAI-only terms [components, experiment, feature, frameworks, infrastructure, ml] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.896 (P=0.945, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.094 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of operational platforms." and "Knowledge of ML platform components including feature stores, model registries," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.581 < STS 0.644 (gap -0.063). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [operational, platforms] and [components, experiment, feature] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [operational, platforms]. WIDAI-only: [components, experiment, feature, frameworks, infrastructure, ml].
